attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who can win from small groups (4 riders or fewer), capable of balancing team duties while positioning for personal success in sprint finishes from reduced groups.
team_tactics: Willing to work for team leader's objectives (Van Avermaet GC) while simultaneously pursuing stage wins; exploits bonus second opportunities in intermediate sprints and special segments like golden kilometers.
terrain_preference: Excels in Flemish one-day races and stage races with mixed terrain allowing breakaways; strong enough to contribute to breaks while retaining sprint finish. Cobbled classics are target races despite crash vulnerability.
vulnerability: Susceptible to crashes in nervous cobbled race positioning, particularly touch-of-wheels incidents in mid-race that can eliminate him from contention before key race-deciding moments.
key_patterns: Wins from small breakaways (4 riders) where he can outsprint remaining companions.
Targets bonus second opportunities aggressively in stage races, including special segments.
Crashes in cobbled classics peloton positioning, eliminating him from contention mid-race.
Balances team domestique duties with personal ambitions, capable of both roles simultaneously.
form_trajectory: unknown: significant gap between 2019 winning form and 2022 crash; insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
